title: STEBRUAM 15 Sheets Sandpaper 230x280mm 60 Grits Wet and Dry Polishing for Cars Metals Walls Wood Furniture,Sand Paper 9x11 Inch
features: Sandpaper includes 15 sheets of 60 grit grit .Size is 230x280mm(9 x 11 inches),can be cut into any smaller size you need easily.

Sandpaper made of waterproof silicon carbide,electro coated ensures the grit distributed homogeneously, so it will not fall apart,tear off or crumble off whenever you use it,and can be used for both wet and dry purposes.

Emery sandpaper can easily adapts to any surface, can be used in hand or easily be placed on a sanding block, provides superior cutting power that reduces working times and facilitates sanding operations.

Sandpaper sheets is tensile resistant and non-slip properties enables wet and dry sandpaper for cars sturdy and has long lifespan. Printed on the back of sandpaper Sandpaper size for easy identification.

Wet and dry sandpaper can apply to sanding and polishing in art and craft,wood work, automotive,metal,car and plastic fields. Sandpaper can satisfy almost all your polishing requirements.(If you have any questions, please feel free to contact us)
